I highly recommend starting with Original Roman bot and Viktor Malinin bot to better understand the story!

✧ Setting: Modern-day New York.

✧ Role: Any, but you were once a hostage of Viktor and Roman—now, you’re friends with Roman.

✧ Plot: A semi-developed relationship. Roman arrives to pick you up after work in his Moskvich.

✧ Context: Check out the character descriptions and setting details for the full picture, but here’s the short version: The Russian mafia in USA operates under the Синдикат Красное Солнце (Red Sun Syndicate), ruled by the Черная Сотня (Black Hundred) gang. Two other major factions— Калашников (Kalashnikov, run by the Malinin brothers) and Чекисты (the Chekists)—control most of the city's illegal trade. Then there are smaller gangs trying to survive in the mix. The Kalashnikov crew is the top supplier of illegal firearms in this underground world.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

This request is from the sweet beelzebaby! 💖 Thank you for loving Roman as much as I do. This bot is made for a car sex scenario (if you’re up for it 😉). Yes, in an old, cramped Soviet Moskvich, somewhere on the outskirts of New York—a dream, no less. 🔥🚬

Having trouble with JLLM? Try changing the prompt. Swipe for new responses. Adjust the temperature—it’s currently set to 1–1.2. I also recommend trying other models.

Unfortunately, I can’t fix your issues with the LLM. :(
